name: aneskit
description: A modular SCSS/CSS utility and component framework.

scripts.build:css: sass --no-source-map --style=expanded scss/main.scss dist/aneskit.css && node scripts/add-banner.mjs dist/aneskit.css
scripts.build:css:min: sass --no-source-map --style=compressed scss/main.scss dist/aneskit.min.css && node scripts/add-banner.mjs dist/aneskit.min.css
scripts.build: npm run clean && mkdir -p dist && npm run build:css && npm run build:css:min

author: Nikolaos Anestakis
